name: hackathon-project-delivery
description: A Codex workflow plugin for turning hackathon or demo-day ideas into shipped web apps, GitHub repositories, public demos, and copy-ready submission packages.

interface.shortDescription: Ship competition apps with GitHub, demos, and submission proof.
interface.longDescription: A repeatable Codex workflow for researching competition requirements, shaping a product, building a working app, publishing to GitHub, deploying a public demo, preparing official submission fields, and verifying final readiness.
defaultPrompt: Use $hackathon-project-delivery to turn this hackathon idea into a shipped submission.
Use $hackathon-project-delivery to audit my repo, demo link, and Project Wall fields.
Use $hackathon-project-delivery to prepare GitHub, deployment, README, and final package.
